titles.title: Let Your Living Water Flow Over My Soul

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let Your living water flow over my soul Let Your Holy Spirit come and take control Of every situation that has troubled my mind All my cares and burdens on to You, I roll

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus Sing to the Father Father, Father, Father Holy Spirit Spirit, Spirit, Spirit

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come now Holy Spirit and take control Hold me in Your loving arms and make me whole Wipe away all doubt and fear and take my pride Draw me to Your love and keep me by Your side

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus Pray to the Father Father, Father, Father Spirit, Spirit, Spirit

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Give your life to Jesus, let Him fill your soul Let Him take you in His arms and make you whole As you give your life to Him, He'll set you free You will live and reign with Him eternally

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus Let us talk to the Father Father, Father, Father Fresh your spirit Spirit, Spirit, Spirit
